productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Solid Beige Shorts
description: Composition Beige cargo pants made of 100% cotton, has a looped waistband with an elasticated back, a hook and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two cargo pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, two cargo pockets on the knees with buttoned flaps, distressed look brand name on the right leg and distressed look graphic on the right pocket at the back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the outdoors with these beige cargo pants from palm tree. The wide elasticated band gives a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. The distressed look branding and graphic adds to the brand appeal of these pants. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
